title: Exception: Query failed to run by returning code of 504

posts.author: pchinazzo (Pierre-Louis Chinazzo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear all,

I’m trying to do a query of my board

query {
  boards(ids: XXXXXX) {
    items {
    id
      name
      column_values {
        text
                    value
      }
    }
  }
}

and i have this error :

Exception: Query failed to run by returning code of 504.

Do you know what it can be ?

Thanks

posts.author: volodymyr.havryliuk (Volodymyr Havryliuk)
posts.cookedHtml: Most likely it was network releated issue. The query is ok.

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @pchinazzo

Are you still running into this issue, or does everything seem to be working as expected now?

As @volodymyr.havryliuk noted, I can confirm that your API call is correctly structured

Best,
Scott
